hero.title: AI for Physiotherapist
hero.description: A virtual assistant that books, reminds, and records, while you focus on your patients.

stats.label: Reduction in admin time for therapy professionals.

blocks.heading: Transform the Way Your Physiotherapy Practice Operates
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, our AI Virtual Receptionist is designed specifically for physiotherapists and allied health professionals. It answers calls instantly, manages appointments, provides service information, and ensures your patients always receive prompt, professional communication — even after hours.

blocks.heading: Stay Focused on Patients, Not Paperwork
blocks.description: Our AI Receptionist takes care of repetitive admin so you can stay focused on hands-on treatment. It can book, reschedule, and cancel appointments, send reminders, and answer common patient questions — all through natural conversation. You'll never need to worry about missed calls or double bookings again.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Call or Booking Again
blocks.description: Whether you're with a patient or your reception desk is busy, the AI steps in instantly to handle incoming calls and online messages. It provides details about services, pricing, and availability, then confirms appointments in real time. Your clients get the attention they deserve, even when you're unavailable.

cards.title: Boosts Online Reputation

whyChooseUs.title: Why Physiotherapists Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is built to meet the specific needs of Australian physiotherapists. It integrates with your existing systems, handles calls professionally, and keeps your business running smoothly around the clock. Let our AI take care of admin — so you can take care of your patients.

card.heading: Streamlined Follow-Up and Client Management
card.description: After each appointment, physiotherapists can add notes, record voice memos that are transcribed and summarized, and upload documents or photos directly to the client's record. Everything is stored securely in one place, providing a complete client history for seamless follow-ups and continuity of care.
